source: ONS Annual Population Survey, share of working-age population (16 to 64) with NVQ4+ qualifications, by NUTS-1 region.
vintage_status: approximation: published aggregates used; not pulled from Nomis API for this pilot. The replication package will pin the exact APS dataset extract.
unit: share of working-age population with NVQ4+ qualification

leave_2016_share_by_region._provenance: Electoral Commission, official 23 June 2016 EU referendum results aggregated to NUTS-1 (same vector used in src/abmhp/validation/uk.py:EMPIRICAL_LEAVE_BY_REGION).

differential_note: Differential = Leave(low-graduate region) minus Leave(high-graduate region) = 0.581 (North East) - 0.402 (Greater London) = +0.179.
